name: Ata
title: Pirate
quote: “It's my ship! Do as you're told!”
lore:
The orphan Ata spent most of his time as a young boy working as a longshoreman and dreaming of traveling the high seas. His wish became reality when he came across a pirate ship by chance and began life as a pirate. 

During a treasure hunt, Ata acquired a rare treasure, the Soul Pearl, which he combined with the remains of sea beasts to create a unique weapon that has since become a terror of the seas. The white anchor he carries, another treasure wrestled from the sea, serves as a symbol of his bravery.
summary: Ata is a C-tier Clash Lane / Jungling Tank in Honor of Kings. Specialty: Crowd Control/Recovery.

skills.name: Child of the Sea

skills.description: Endeavor to jump up and deal physical damage to smashed enemies when you land. Afterwards, bounce up again, dealing the same damage as well as a 0.5 second knockback effect when you land. Immunity to control during the jump. When attacking multiple enemies at once, damage decays by 20% for each additional enemy, down to 60%. Increases damage to minions by an additional 30%.

skills.name: Sea Anchor
skills.description: Throw the anchor straight out to hit enemies in front of you, dealing physical damage and 60% slow for 1.5 seconds. If the anchor is embedded in a wall, Ata will use the force to dash himself and the enemy to that spot. When it hits the wall, it deals Physical damage and stuns for 0.5 seconds. [Passive]: after using [Anchor], the next basic attack within 3 seconds will pull the enemy back with the anchor.

title: Navenia Mercenary
quote: “Butterfly, set to dance.”
lore: In the eyes of the people, Butterfly is an top-notch mercenary with neither emotion nor desire. Rumor has it that the reason she works so hard to complete her mission is to repay a debt to the Mercenary Guild. However, what no one knows is that this girl, orphaned since childhood, has certain fond memories of her childhood despite her arduous training under the guild, thanks to a man named Allain. Thus, she has followed his trail to Navenia, vowing to find her precious companion even if he no longer remembers her.
summary: Butterfly is a mid-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to play cleanup. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

name: Fatih
title: King of Asitane
quote: “To get the Red Apple, you need more than ladders or slings. I'd say, companions are more important.”
lore:
"Asitane shall fall into the hand of the destined sultan like a ripe red apple."
So did the prophecy foretell. 
Hakan's succession was not a smooth one—he was even exiled once during the process. But that exile granted him valuable experience and connections, which he used to formulate a delicate plan.
Years later, he retook the throne. Thwarting the elders' attempts to manipulate him, Hakan put everyone's doubts to shame and reclaimed Asitane. As the dust settled after the long siege, the silhouette of Hakan appeared on Asitane's walls. From that moment onward, he became known to the world as Fatih, the prophesied Conqueror. 
Bearing wit and bravery, the Conqueror shall continue to bring countless new legends to this land.
summary: Fatih is a B-tier Clash Lane / Jungling Fighter in Honor of Kings. Specialty: Lifesteal.

name: Flowborn (Mage)
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “Only in battle can you learn your own truth.”
lore:
According to future historians, Jixia Academy was where it all began. But if we turn back the clock to the present—at the unnoticed gates of Jixia Academy—a student has just returned from his studies abroad...
The wheels of fate have begun to turn, and no one can break the cycle already set in motion. You knew you'd end up walking that thorny road, because it was never ice-cold rationality and planning that guided you, but the warmth that arose from within in the moment while fighting alongside your companions.
summary: Flowborn (Mage) are a situational Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane.

Can spend 4 stacks of Flow to use the skill without triggering cooldown.

Can spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop the skill from entering cooldown after this use.

name: Garuda
title: A mysterious being born of human desire
quote: “Where wills converge, life begins; where justice wanes, judgment descends.”
lore:
An ancient creature born from the wishes of the Sandpura, this giant bird deity took a physical form to serve as their guardian.
When he first appeared in the mortal realm, he granted people whatever they desired, heaping wealth and power on them. While his intent was to help them overcome the calamities facing them, in the end these blessings only bred greed and bloodshed. Realizing the complexity of human nature and drained from handing out countless blessings, the great bird exiled himself, vanishing into the clouds. Even though he still heard the people's prayers, visions of the bloody battles his blessings had enabled were fresh in his mind. Determined not to let his blessings breed disaster yet again, he used his long period of isolation to reflect on the cycles of cause and effect in the human world, until he was able to understand and embrace the nuances of humanity.
Centuries later, a greedy lord plotted to awaken the great bird once more, intending to use its blessings to carry out his wicked scheme. However, a papyrus letter drifted to Garuda Khageswara on the wind, bearing a cry for help from Sandpura Island once again. Garuda Khageswara had come to see that, aside from bestowing blessings, he also possessed the power to uphold justice. Golden-feathered arrows rained from the sky, striking down the greedy lord. In his dazzling radiance, treasures dissolved into golden light, streaking across the sky and into the horizon. From that moment on, the great bird became the "Wings of Judgment."
Those who have too much will eventually lose their peace of mind. Those who have too little need but a few good seeds to start a new life. From then on, whenever people had more than they needed, they returned it to the great bird, balancing the scales.
The great bird now presides over Azuria, upholding his philosophy of balance through judgment and preserving peace in the sea in the south.
summary: Garuda is a B-tier Mid Mage in Honor of Kings. Specialty: Poke/Speed Up.

name: Lapulapu
title: Datu of Nectam
quote: “This battle.... has yet to end!”
lore:
The people of Nectam revered the power of the sea beast Bakunawa without exception, a creature as ruthless, fierce, and changeable as the tide. It was known to all that those who sought its aid paid a price.
As the Datu of Nectam, Lapulapu found himself under invasion from a nearby isle, aided by Western adventurers. Refusing to let his rule be threatened, he put everything on the line to rally his forces and strike back.
Ultimately, both islands suffered heavy casualties, while the Western adventurers arrived at the last minute, ready to reap the spoils.
Lapulapu finally realized that in clinging to power, he had become a pawn in someone else's game.
Without hesitation, he entered the island's holy place, knowing the price he would pay—that one day, he would turn to stone in exchange for the sea beast's power to summon the waves.
The islanders stood together against the invaders, and the island was returned to them once more. Lapulapu's heart had now become stone.
He had no way of knowing when he would be fully transformed into part of the reef, forever standing guard in the shallows.
But before that day came, he had work to do. He would rebuild his homeland and strengthen the islands. The fight was far from over...
summary: Lapulapu is a C-tier Roam / Clash Lane Support/Tank in Honor of Kings. Specialty: Crowd Control/Team Buffs.

name: Agudo
title: Forest Child
quote: “My turf, my rules!”
lore:
Agudo is a true child of the wild. Her best friend is a giant creature called Furball, and together they are a force unto themselves even against great armies. 
Having lived in the dense woods covering the hills of the Three Kingdoms region from a young age, Agudo has become a true expert on all herbs and plant-based medicines, and she can communicate with wild animals and beasts. Agudo can bring large seed bombs to bear on the battlefield—often causing great confusion among her enemies, and call out to the animals of the forest for aid until the forest's despoilers truly understand the power of the mountain.
summary: Agudo is a struggling Jungle Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Ata-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Alessio
title: Protector of the Outer City
quote: “I shall carry on the legend with my heroic deeds!”
lore: Alessio was originally a small fry in the Outer City of Navenia. However, when fate called, he accepted a request from the legendary Captain Red Hawk to put on his mask and become a "copycat" of the great hero of the people. Later, when the people learned that he was just masquerading as the original Captain Red Hawk, he was forced to figure out who he really wanted to be... Now, with his mask off, he still gallivants about with his cannon, protecting the peace of the Outer City with his customized cannon shells. If you run into any problems, he will be sure to stand up for you, even if it's against the city's ruler...
summary: Alessio is a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Arke-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Allain
title: Navenia Mercenary
quote: “I am the sheath that protects the blade and not the edge that takes lives.”
lore:
Chilling dual swords. An innocent spirit. These two may seem in conflict, but somehow they exist in perfect harmony in Allain. 

Bereft of his memories, he was forced to wander the streets of Navenia. While blessed with remarkable swordsmanship, he was cheated time and time again due to his innocent nature. To survive, he joined the Mercenary Guild. Now, he works hard to survive, his short-term goal being to fill his belly, and his long-term goal being to save up enough for a boat ticket home.
summary: Allain is a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude. Watch for Sima Yi-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Angela
title: Enigmatic Mage
quote: “Knowledge equals power!”
lore:
When the mysterious mage Merlyn accidentally trapped herself in a bubble cage, she was forced to occupy the body of Angela, an unsuspecting passerby, in order to escape. 

Thus, it came to be that this innocent-looking girl is actually an archmage with the ability to wield powerful magic. However, the young Angela had long admired Arthur, the leader of the Knights of the Round Table. This emotion is still there, and it is so strong that Merlyn is finding it impossible to resist.
summary: Angela is a strong Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Spell Tome. Watch for Han Xin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Ao'yin
title: Descendant of Dragons
quote: “The dragon soars above the abyss, and will not stop until his name is known!”
lore: He comes from an ancient race of dragons that disappeared from the world a long time ago. After a transformative experience that changed his life, this childish young man returned to the world a hundred times more resolute than before. He vowed to return the true name of his vanished race to this world. In this vast world, all that's left of this ancient race will be watching him as he attempts to reclaim what was lost.
summary: Ao'yin is a top-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Lightfoot Shoes. Watch for Garo-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Arke
title: Avenging Assassin
quote: “A new life is born. The legend lives on.”
lore: She is the last descendant of the Jing clan, relying on her older brother since childhood. In seeking revenge for her brother's death, she attempted to assassinate Crown Prince Dan, but failed and was gravely injured, only to be saved by a musician. Upon awakening, the girl lost her memory, only remembering her name as Arke and her resolve for peace. She eventually attempted to assassinate the sovereign of Yong with the sword of 'peace.'... The world only knows of her failed attempt, yet unaware that the girl, wandering with the musician since, continues to embody the spirit of peace.
summary: Arke is a top-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

lore:
Arli is a dancer at Changle District, known throughout Chang'an for her graceful movements. Her renown provides an excellent cover, allowing her to gather information while performing at various banquets reserved for the rich and famous. 

As she twirls the parasol deftly between her fingers, she continues to safeguard the justice of Chang'an from behind the scenes.

title: Leader of the Knights of the Round Table

lore:
When the temple of the Knights of the Round Table was under attack, young traveler Arthur drew Excalibur—the sword in the stone—and defeated the invaders. Since that day, he has been hailed as "King Arthur." 

Armed with Excalibur, he swore to protect the temple that symbolized the honor and dignity of the Knights of the Round Table. With a firm belief in the honor of the Knights, he rallied the forces of Eventide Cathedral under his name.
summary: Arthur is a strong Clash Lane Fighter who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Lightfoot Shoes. Watch for Xiang Yu-style counters in the enemy draft.

lore: There was once a proud warrior hailing from a family of knights who served at the Round Table of King Arthur. This warrior has made it her life's mission to defend the kingdom of Sunset from harm. As she faced her greatest fear, a spirit of the Forbidden Realm, head-on, she realized that the spirit was actually the reincarnation of the goddess Athena, and as she was Athena's descendant, she and the spirit became one. From that moment forward, her lance and her armor were to be forged from victory and glory, and she was Athena reborn.
summary: Athena is a struggling Jungle Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Axe of Torment. Watch for Sun Bin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Augran
title: Seer / Leader of the Order of the Seers
quote: “Life is but a journey, and death but a return.”
lore: Qi's life should have been filled with light and joy. He was friendly, outgoing, and full of youth and laughter. But then the Wilting happened, and a sudden disaster took all of his friends overnight. Qi carries this pain in his heart as he marches on. With his spear, he cut himself off from the past and settled in the marshes. Now, he is Augran, the ruthless High Priest who commands the power of life and death, and the only one who can put an end to the Wilting.
summary: Augran is a top-tier Jungle Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Liu Bei-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Bai Qi
title: General of Yong
quote: “I'm both the wound and the sword's edge.”
lore: When the Blood Clan invaded, a boy named Bai Qi was injured while protecting the young sovereign of Yong. Though he was healed by a sage, he was warned not to touch the wound. But as Bai Qi grew older, he ignored the warning and fought on to protect Yong, ending up heavily injured once more. Finally, he put on a mask that would allow the wound to fester, and the power of the Blood Clan to thoroughly fuse with his body. He never took it off again. From that point on, he would be known only as the God of War—a hunched, decaying monster that would sweep across the battlefield with his scythe.
summary: Bai Qi is a mid-tier Clash Lane Tank who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude. Watch for Zhuangzi-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Biron
title: Navenian Mercenary
quote: “However great it is, I must conquer my fear！”
lore:
Biron was but a lowly commoner, an unremarkable but valiant fighter who grew braver with every battle. Once he'd come of age, Biron became a guard and traveled around Sunset with a merchant caravan, during which time he noticed the minute changes that pollution was causing to Navenia. 

He therefore paid a visit to Milady, the ruler of the city, and it was this reckless act that lost him his arm, but he did not give up on finding the truth. Instead, he relied on a courage and resolution he never had before to stop the pollution from spreading throughout Navenia.
summary: Biron is a strong Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Meteor. Watch for Lady Sun-style counters in the enemy draft.

lore:
The pure and kind-hearted Cai Yan always brings laughter and joy to the people around her. Although she lost her father at an early age, she grew up very much loved by Dian Wei and her foster father, Cao Cao. However, when the truth behind past events was revealed and her adoptive father showed his true colors, she was forced to flee what she thought was her home. 

No matter her sufferings and predicaments, she never lost sight of herself, and she continues to face this complicated world with a smile. As she flies across the battlefield, she uses her music to inspire and strengthen everyone.
summary: Cai Yan is a strong Roam Support who wants to play team buffs. Watch for Gao Changgong-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Chano
title: Leader of the Wolves
quote: “The Ancient Wolf once said that the spirit of the wolf can be found within its sharpest fang.”
lore: Years later, the Last Wolf had long become the King of the Northlands. Memories of his early days in Chonokh rose to the surface as Chano ignored his foreign allies' invitation to conquer the East and fixed his gaze on the glory and danger hidden in the north of the Winter Ocean.  He had been celebrated as a tribal hero and branded a beast, only to be betrayed by his best friend and left at death's doors. Yet he never ceased his pursuit. Unlike most, he understood the secrets of the Sunfall. He knew he was not born to follow mere human desires. His mission was to destroy the source of all suffering in the Northlands...
summary: Chano is a strong Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Ziya-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Charlotte
title: Noble Swordwoman
quote: “We cherish glory, but not the glory of the past.”
lore:
Elegant and beautiful, Charlotte is a knight of noble heritage from Sunset. Her ancestors came from across the sea, and after several generations of business dealings, her family established its reputation within Sunset.

Now, a series of tragic events have stirred up chaos in the city. To defend her family's pride and honor, Charlotte has decided to follow the trail to Kyokutou and hopefully find the source behind all this chaos.
summary: Charlotte is a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Meteor. Watch for Arli-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Chicha
title: Master Crafter of the Dawnseekers
quote: “If no one has succeeded before, then I will give it a try!”
lore: The hot-headed, single-minded forging fanatic from the mountains. Slight in stature but with a spirit that towers over mountains, Chicha believes the Dawnseekers will always find a path upward. She has mastered the art of countless arms, reforging five into a single weapon she can transform at will, but this still isn't enough for her—Chicha vows to make her creation the strongest weapon in existence, and with her clan, quell the raging chaos plaguing the land.
summary: Chicha is a top-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to play maximum attack speed. Public guides recommend a build starting with Twinblades of Destruction.

name: Cirrus
title: Reincarnated Bird Spirit
quote: “My memories are waking... Oh, the boundless blue sky!”
lore:
He was a bird that lived in the forest with his doe companion, who was killed by the war. The lone surviving bird sacrificed everything for a chance to protect the forest. 
Reincarnated with the help of Guiguzi, he lost his wings, eyes, and memories. Trapped in a human body, his bird spirit desired freedom, until Donghuang reforged his wings and he became Cirrus the Seer.
He has been looking for his identity and freedom ever since, and a sliver of memory awakened during his quest.
summary: Cirrus is a struggling Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Di Renjie-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Consort Yu
title: Protector of Nature
quote: “Light as the breeze... swift as an arrow.”
lore:
A girl at one with the forces of nature, innocent and beautiful. Every arrow from her bow radiates the blessings of the forest. Acting upon her master's orders, she embarked on a journey to explore the world around her, and in the process, fell in love with the heroic Xiang Yu. 

However, she was warned by her senior, Liang, that the person she had fallen in love with was the dark master from the prophecies. Brokenhearted and resigned to her fate, Consort Yu's arrow had already tragically pierced her lover's heart when the illusion of the being disguised as Liang wore off. How will this fateful love tragedy end, and what should the despairing Consort Yu do?
summary: Consort Yu is a strong Farm Marksman who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Luna-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Da Qiao
title: Successor to the Clan of Famous Sorcerers
quote: “I watch over the sky, the sea... and your memories.”
lore: A steadfast protector of Jiang, Da Qiao is also a very caring companion. She was once forced to marry someone out of filial piety, but on the night before her wedding, she met Sun Ce while she was standing on the shore, looking out to the sea in sorrow. If she is the port that he comes home to, then he is the light that brings her out of her darkness. Her controlling of the tides to protect this land is to fulfill her lover's dream and to exercise her will.
summary: Da Qiao is a top-tier Roam Support who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Guardian. Watch for Arke-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Daji
title: Ziya's Creation
quote: “Why did you create me? Is there something you need help with?”
lore:
A puppet devoid of emotions who was created by an old man proficient in sorcery, Daji is an unparalleled beauty. Even though she was created as a puppet, she looks no different from ordinary humans, but Daji, who lacks an actual heart, can't understand human emotions. 

Full of innocence and purity, she feels vexed and confused about her feelings. Though her seductive appearance often makes her enemies forget just how dangerous she actually is, the ignorant Daji's greatest desire was to discover her own heart.
summary: Daji is a top-tier Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Spell Tome. Watch for Gao Changgong-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Dharma
title: Warrior Monk
quote: “Even here, I must remain true to who I am.”
lore:
Dharma is a fearless monk who seeks the light, fighting off the confusion of this mortal world with his fists of fury. The destruction of his kingdom and the fall of his family came upon this former prince as quickly as a thief in the night: after his brother-in-arms betrayed him and assassinated his father, Dharma went on a rampage, unleashing the full power of his skills in martial arts. 

When the dust settled, much of the kingdom lay in ruins. Misunderstood or even hated by the subjects of his late father, he chose to go into exile. Before long, despair, hunger, and extreme thirst drove him to the limits of endurance. Indeed, he would have perished were it not for the mercy of a passing monk on a journey west from Chang'an City. When Dharma recovered, he chose to travel to the place that had produced this strange monk. Thus Dharma traveled east, setting out on his own journey to make sense of the world.
summary: Dharma is a struggling Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude. Watch for Xiang Yu-style counters in the enemy draft.

lore:
Demanding nothing less than perfection in his role as a law enforcer, Di Renjie is Chang'an's most dependable defender. With his steadfast spirit and integrity, he strikes fear into the hearts of criminals, and through his achievements as magistrate, he has even earned the trust of the honored empress, Wu Zetian herself. 

His tokens represent justice, often deadly justice, as they also serve as his weapon of choice. Acting as Wu Zetian's eyes on the ground, he makes sure no suspicious activity goes uninvestigated.
summary: Di Renjie is a situational Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity.

name: Dian Wei
title: General of Wei
quote: “The beast within me has awoken!”
lore:
Wild and tenacious yet also a kind soul, Dian Wei the berserker had always lived a conflicted life. Born with ferali blood, he found it difficult to control the animal within, and the conflict between the beast and his gentle nature caused him a great amount of pain. 

Things only improved when he encountered Little Lute, a young girl whom he felt he truly wanted to protect. From then on, he was content to shackle himself with heavy armor and become a trapped beast. This is both his punishment and his atonement.
summary: Dian Wei is a strong Jungle Fighter who wants to play cleanup. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Sun Bin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Diaochan
title: Renowned Dancer
quote: “Try not to fall in love with me...”
lore:
To Diaochan, her beauty was both a gift of nature and the source of her misfortune. Hailing from the most powerful mercenary group in the world, her peerless beauty became a natural weapon of choice. 

As the dancer wandered the troubled world, in order to complete a mission, she had to pretend to reciprocate Lu Bu's affections. As had happened with so many others, Lu Bu paid for his love with his life. However, Diaochan longs for true freedom, and no one knows that her true desire lies hidden behind her mesmerising dance.
summary: Diaochan is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Tranquility. Watch for Liang-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Dolia
title: Merfolk Princess
quote: “The waves are the ocean's laughter; the stars are the sky's dreams. That's how the song goes!”
lore:
The merfolk have been using their songs to guard the ocean and maintain peace within the waters for millennia. The young mermaid Dolia was born deep below the waves, and she possesses enforcer ancestry. Ever since she was a child, she has had an enchanting singing voice, and her people believed that she had great potential. 

While searching for treasures in shipwrecks, she used her mermaid's song to help a human boy, Heino, who had been lost at sea. With that, she gained a "secret" human friend, and her fate became inextricably tied to Navenia's. However, the choices and bonds thrust upon them would put an abrupt end to their story... while also opening up a new chapter.
summary: Dolia is a strong Roam Support who wants to protect carries through burst windows. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem. Watch for Sima Yi-style counters in the enemy draft.

skills.name: Mermaid's Gift
skills.description: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second. The mermaid form's Basic Attacks will shoot water arrows for ranged damage. Dolia's [Recovery] is replaced with [Mermaid's Gift], which allows her to create a pact with a selected teammate, and prioritizes her pacted teammate when using [Celestial Melody].

skills.name: Ode
skills.description: Dolia chants 4 sound waves that spread outward, the first 3 dealing spell damage and 10% slow. The 4th deals more spell damage and 50% slow for 1 second. The sound waves also echo when they hit an enemy, dealing spell damage to those they touch and, if released in water, sending waves of water knocking back nearby enemies (knockback of enemies around you has a stun effect). Non-heroic units provoke a much smaller echo, dealing only 50% of the damage.

skills.name: Wavemaker
skills.description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Celestial Melody
skills.description: After Dolia briefly chants, refresh the skill with the longest current cooldown of a friendly within range, taking more cooldown from yourself. If a teammate's skill is not used after being refreshed, [Celestial Melody]'s cooldown recovery speed can be accelerated by 20/30/40%. Teammates do not consume Mana or Energy when using the skill for 5 seconds after the skill is refreshed, and the beatdown benefit caused by the skill is split equally with Dolia. Refreshing skills for contracted teammates is prioritized, followed by non-contracted teammates, or refreshing your own skills if there are no teammates nearby. Failure to refresh a skill returns most of the cooldown of [Celestial Melody].

name: Donghuang
title: Ruler of Donghuang City
quote: “The eclipse is near... and so is my miracle!”
lore:
He did not want to settle for the end that all mediocre beings inevitably march toward, so he completed the trials and became Donghuang the Seer. However, even when the truth about the Wonder was exposed and it was revealed that nothing had changed, he still chose to devour their power and became a demigod. 
Now he resides in his palace high above Misty Marshes, and is revered by the Omniscient. This, however, is not his final goal. One day, he will take all the powers of the Wonder and reign absolute over this world.
summary: Donghuang is a mid-tier Roam Support who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Resistance.

name: Dr Bian
title: Physician
quote: “Shall I let you live, or let you die?”
lore:
Dr Bian was once a kind doctor committed to curing diseases and saving lives. With his expert medical skills, he managed to save countless patients. 

However, he was later framed by his master and accused of poisoning the Lord of Yong, a betrayal that almost caused his death. Since then, he no longer trusts anyone and instead spends all his time on gruesome drug trials and research into poisons in the name of revenge.
summary: Dr Bian is a struggling Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane. Watch for Yang Jian-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Dun
title: General of Wei
quote: “Losing an eye isn't so bad... Gives you that rugged look...”
lore:
Dun was once a mercenary, a pursuit he followed not out of a desire for gold but because he had run out of worthy opponents. 

Known to have killed hundreds of men, he struck fear into the hearts of bandits everywhere. While the weak fell prey to money, Dun alone stood out in his desire to challenge the strong, even at the cost of an eye. Thus, when Cao Cao promised him limitless challenges if he joined his army, the one-eyed mercenary was all too happy to pick up his broadsword and continue fighting for the rest of his life.
summary: Dun is a strong Clash Lane Tank who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude. Watch for Han Xin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Dyadia
title: Mystic Responsible for Weaving the Strings of Fate
quote: “I'm the observer of earthly affairs, connecting kindred spirits from all directions.”
lore: The crafty and wily Dyadia is the most popular priestess in the Misty Marshes. The forest's inhabitants see her as a mysterious and powerful being capable of predicting any couple's future with a single glance. She has never predicted a relationship that didn't come to pass. When people aren't paying attention, however, Dyadia burns the candle on both ends, collecting information, observing her subjects, drafting her fortunes, and even setting up "chance" encounters... All because she firmly believes that deep down, everyone desires a meaningful connection. Rumor has it that Dyadia's professionalism stems from a missed opportunity in her own past, but when asked directly if these rumors are true, she'll simply flash her signature smile. "What do you think?"
summary: Dyadia is a strong Roam Support who wants to play team buffs. Public guides recommend a build starting with Crimson Shadow - Redemption.

name: Erin
title: Elf Princess
quote: “Ideanor is close by, I can feel it!”
lore:
Erin is a curious and ebullient young elf princess who was born in the Luminescent Forest. Unfortunately, her position also forced her into endless insufferable rituals, dances, and a perfectly ordered life as determined by elvish custom. 



These restraints prompted Erin to flee the forest for the human world and her own adventure just before her coming-of-age ceremony...
summary: Erin is a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane. Watch for Dun-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Fang
title: Chang'an Detective
quote: “The great detective, at your service!”
lore:
Though Fang is of ferali descent, Chang'an took him in with open arms. He's a bit of an oddball but he's also smart and agile, and has the ability to sniff out all kinds of secrets. 

Once, by chance, Fang came to the honored empress Wu Zetian's aid, but he also saw something he shouldn't have. In the face of questioning by the Chang'an magistrate, Fang was able to use the secret he had chanced upon to save his life. When he was offered a job as Di Renjie's assistant, the prospect of a salary made him more than happy to help maintain the peace in Chang'an.
summary: Fang is a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Dun-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Feyd
title: Jade City Prince
quote: “I'm enjoying myself. Who cares about right and wrong?”
lore: Feyd has become a household name in Jade City for a number of reasons: his profligate spending, heir to the throne, and the infamous lack of fixed employment as beneficiary of the public purse. His subjects likely don't realize the same happy-go-lucky prince is, in fact, one of his city's most tireless defenders on a never-ending quest to uncover its darkest secrets. Naturally, he ignores all such rumors out of his preoccupation with the fight against injustice. Indeed, a look over the city walls at night might just reveal the unrestrained figure of a dashing prince.
summary: Feyd is a top-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

name: Flowborn (Marksman)
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “Only in battle can you learn your own truth.”
lore:
According to future historians, Jixia Academy was where it all began. But if we turn back the clock to the present—at the unnoticed gates of Jixia Academy—a student has just returned from his studies abroad...
The wheels of fate have begun to turn, and no one can break the cycle already set in motion. You knew you'd end up walking that thorny road, because it was never ice-cold rationality and planning that guided you, but the warmth that arose from within in the moment while fighting alongside your companions.
summary: Flowborn (Marksman) are a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Resistance.

name: Fuzi
title: One of the Three Sages of Jixia
quote: “Without a great sage, this land would be doomed to darkness!”
lore:
When Fuzi founded Jixia Academy, he became the first of the Three Sages of Jixia, the other two being Zhuangzi and Mozi. Fuzi strongly believes that any attempt to seek wisdom or explore sorcery beyond the proper boundaries of one's knowledge will only lead to ruin. 

To impart knowledge in a relatively safe and controlled environment, Fuzi accepts any capable student, and teaches them according to each individual's aptitude. As a result, Fuzi's name has become like a great lantern to which the talented people of the land are drawn.
summary: Fuzi is a situational Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude.

name: Gan & Mo
title: Swordsmith and His Wife-blade
quote: “Two souls, one body. One love, neverending.”
lore:
Gan Jiang is a master swordsmith from the Misty Marshes with an unnatural obsession with swords and blades. His bed-ridden wife Mo Ye threw herself into the forge in a fit of insanity, sacrificing her life to grant him a divine blade. 

Gan Jiang was filled with regret, but it was too late, and he allowed the sorcery to corrupt him and make him one with the sword. With the two becoming one, the divine blade transformed into his wife's likeness, and now, Gan Jiang and Mo Ye will never be separated again.
summary: Gan & Mo are a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Stone of Sorcery. Watch for Butterfly-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Gao
title: Wandering Musician
quote: “Alright! It's showtime!”
lore:
Originally a talented bard with a burning passion for music, Gao embarked on a new journey to find his purpose in life. When he chanced upon the Battle of Changping, the savage and bloodthirsty monsters shook the bard to his core. 

From that moment on, ending the war became more important than music. In order to end the war, he formed an anti-Yong alliance. By chance, he also saved Arke, an assassin who had been injured and knocked unconscious. While he heals her wounds with music, she holds nothing back in serving his cause with her sword.
summary: Gao is a struggling Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage.

name: Gao Changgong
title: Prince of the Golden City
quote: “I draw my country's borders with my blade.”
lore:
Originally a prince of the Golden City, he witnessed the death of his parents and the destruction of his country, after which he went from a pampered prince to a bereaved wanderer without a home. 

However, through harsh training, this beaten-down man became a fearsome assassin. In order to reclaim his homeland from Dunefort, he marched on the Great Wall, fully aware that it was a vainglorious endeavor.
summary: Gao Changgong is a strong Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

name: Garo
title: Heir to Madinat Erudit
quote: “Thanks to Madinat Erudit's blessing we shall know peace.”
lore:
Garo hails from the family in charge of managing the collection of books kept in Madinat Erudit. As the most famous center of learning in Alsahraa, this place was home to texts containing deep knowledge, and only selected scholars were allowed in to study. 
Garo transcribed diligently and practiced archery, firm in her belief that protecting books was akin to protecting civilization. When the feralis raided, killing her family and destroying Madinat Erudit's ancient texts, she was left to wander in search of the texts scattered by the ferali invasion. As she did, the truth was soon revealed...
summary: Garo is a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Sparkforged Dagger.

name: Guan Yu
title: General of Shu
quote: “Once you have chosen your path, you cannot waver.”
lore:
Guan Yu possesses a strength of character that fortifies the hearts of his comrades, and a ferocity that shakes the resolve of his enemies. Boasting a sterling record from the start, he never wavers from his resolve to accomplish whatever goals he sets for himself. He values trust and abhorrs betrayal.

After getting to know Liu Bei, his philosophy was further strengthened, driving him on in his pursuit of a faithful brother-in-arms. Astride his horse, Red Hare, he'll charge into the battlefield, swiftly beheading enemies right and left.
summary: Guan Yu is a struggling Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Fortitude.

name: Guiguzi
title: Scholar, ex-Order of the Seers elder
quote: “Everything has a soul!”
lore: Knowledge is endless. The scholar Guiguzi was attracted by the secrets of the forest's origin, and became a member of the Order of the Seers. Over the years, he researched nature and the Wonders, and passed on his discoveries to the next generation of Seers. However, the more he learned, the more anxious he became... Eventually, he decided to leave the Order and start anew in nature. He firmly believes that a new truth is out there somewhere.
summary: Guiguzi is a struggling Roam Support who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

name: Han Xin
title: Ba General
quote: “I will repay your damage hundredfold!”
lore:
Han Xin may seem compliant and cooperative, but beneath the surface, he is an unyielding strategist filled with an ambition that even rivals that of his master, Liu Bang. He has endured countless humiliations as a means to survive and achieve his goals, while silently nurturing the rage that has imprinted itself upon his heart. 

Han Xin pretends to be just another one of Liu Bang's subordinates, waiting for his chance to raise a storm in the Riverlands to avenge himself and return all the humiliation he has suffered a hundred-fold.
summary: Han Xin is a situational Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Rapacious Bite. Watch for Agudo-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Haya
title: Enforcer, Moonling, Alsahraa butterfly keeper
quote: “Vicissitudes in a flash of light.”
lore: A young girl once abandoned as "useless", Haya was saved by Diqun. She then became an enforcer, vowing to dedicate her life to the deity. During the Fall of the Superbeings, Haya died saving Diqun. Her soul remained in a slumber atop Tianque Peak in the northern desert. A thousand years later, she was awakened by a skeleton blast, and began to plan Diqun's return... Now, her conspiracy gradually surfaces. The long-buried events from a millennium ago in Alsahraa are about to be revealed...
summary: Haya is a strong Mid Mage who wants to wear down enemies from range. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane.

name: Heino
title: Head of the Fate Clan
quote: “Fate is devoid of reason. The final choice lies with me.”
lore:
As the heir of the Fate Clan, Heino seemed to be blessed by the heavens, until the fateful day where he lost both his parents and his clan was forcefully removed from the Assembly amidst internal strife. Although the Scepter of Fate subsequently showed him that the Fate Clan is doomed to wither away, Heino is determined to overcome its fate. 

Taking over the reins of the clan, the young man is determined to restore his clan to its former glory, even if it means traversing a treacherous path under scornful and mocking gazes.
summary: Heino is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to wear down enemies from range. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Tranquility. Watch for Butterfly-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Hou Yi
title: Enforcer
quote: “Finally, awake! It's time to hunt!”
lore:
Hou Yi is the only heroic marksman in the world to be made an by superbeings and trusted to carry out their will. He was ordered to destroy the Sun Tower as atonement for the superbeings' enslavement of the ferali. 
In his pursuit of destruction, the power-seeking sharpshooter felt inevitably drawn to the Sun Tower's brilliance and thus absorbed the Wonder's power, which cursed him to a deep slumber. When he woke up, the world was truly Hou Yi's hunting ground.
summary: Hou Yi is a top-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Agudo-style counters in the enemy draft.

title: General of Shu

lore:
This old veteran may have had thoughts about retiring, but his early ambitions never went away and he has held onto his principle of protecting others. In the pursuit of more power, his army gave into the Blood Clan's temptations, causing Huang Zhong to leave in a fit of disdain. 

Fate then led him to Liu Bei and his gang, who helped him give his machine gun an upgrade. On the battlefields of the Red Cliffs, the old soldier fought a bloody battle and regained the fighting spirit he once displayed in his youth.
summary: Huang Zhong is a situational Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity.

name: Jing
title: Espionage Expert
quote: “I project myself onto my mirror.”
lore:
Jing was born to an old enforcer family, receiving rigorous training since her early years. However, her parents went missing mysteriously in the midst of a mission, leaving her and her younger brother, Yao, to fend for themselves.
In order to steer clear of enemies lurking in the shadows, Jing buried her familial ties and entered Jixia Academy along with her brother to become stronger. The trials she faced in the Hall of Mirrors in Jixia Academy granted her strength and glory, yet they were just the first step on the difficult path ahead. At least now she knows that, no matter what the future holds for her, she'll never stop moving forward...
summary: Jing is a struggling Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Rapacious Bite. Watch for Angela-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Kaizer
title: Great Wall Guard
quote: “A sharp mind is better than a sharp blade!”
lore:
Once a Navenian noble, the tenacious and forbearing Kaizer chose to carry his family's curse alone in order to save his sister Luna. In order to trace the source of the anomalic power and free himself from the torment of fate, he wandered eastward to the Great Wall, where he participated in the war against the feralis. 

Though consumed by the demonic suit of armor that had stripped him of all his memories, Mulan's invitation allowed him to remain as a Great Wall Guardian, and his demonic blade has since turned him into a formidable defender of the Great Wall.
summary: Kaizer is a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Lightfoot Shoes. Watch for Donghuang-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Kongming
title: Shu Strategist
quote: “This world is like a game of Go. You must think ahead!”
lore:
Kongming was known as a calm and collected genius at the Jixia Academy. However, his search for knowledge and the origins of the universe became an obsession that nearly consumed him. Under Zhuangzi's guidance, he left the school, and he soon realized that true knowledge rests out there in the real world.

When his travels took him to the Three Kingdoms, where war had broken out, he joined forces with the city of Yi. Armed with his newfound understanding of the world and its people, he soon cemented his reputation as a brilliant strategist.
summary: Kongming is a strong Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane. Watch for Allain-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Kui
title: Warden of Chang'an
quote: “I exist to guard Chang'an City.”
lore:
Kui dwells in the mysterious "door" of Chang'an, keeping a close watch on the path to Vacuity and the source of all wisdom that it leads to. 

Older than Chang'an itself, he'd step out onto Phoenix Street from the doorway in the dead of night and stroll about the quiet areas of a city that only rests once the sun sets. By night, anyone intending to harm Chang'an will be devoured by him and sucked into Vacuity.
summary: Kui is a mid-tier Roam Support who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

name: Lady Sun
title: Princess of Wu
quote: “Get outta my way! Now!”
lore:
To the noble Lady Sun, "powdering one's nose" means to have one's face covered in gunpowder fumes after annihilating those who bully the weak. 

Following in the footsteps of her elder brother, Sun Ce, Lady Sun grew up with the desire to make life better for all of Jiang. One day, after fighting back against a sudden pirate attack, word of her prowess with the cannon spread far and wide. Be it helping her brother reform the country or repelling enemies, this bold lady is always willing to go all out.
summary: Lady Sun is a strong Farm Marksman who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity.

name: Lady Zhen
title: Descendent of the Anomatic
quote: “I thought we could be together forever...”
lore:
What Lady Zhen thought was love was just a deception, an illusion that made her lose her true self and live an unhappy life. 

As an inheritor of the water sacrificial rites, she grew up in absolute obedience to her family's teachings and was denied her desires. That was why, when a member of the Cao family professed his sincere love for her, the intensity of her love led her to betray her own family. 

When it all came to naught, the rain and her tears would define her grief—and her strength.
summary: Lady Zhen is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Scepter of Reverberation. Watch for Charlotte-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Lam
title: Former Wei Killer
quote: “Sneaking in the darkness, striding in the light...”
lore:
The man who now goes by the code name Lam was exiled by his people for his inauspicious birth and spurned by his peers for possessing unnatural abilities.
He was left to die in the rubble of a battlefield but was found by Cao Cao, who took him in and trained him as one of his covert assassins. Lam embraced the lonely life of a hunter in the darkness, if only to survive yet another day. 
That would all change when he was sent on a mission to eliminate Little Lute, a girl who appeared to him so utterly warm-hearted and kind that shattered his beliefs and led him to abandon his past once and for all. Now, the ruthless assassin is only willing to get his hands dirty for those he deems worthy.
summary: Lam is a top-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Erin-style counters in the enemy draft.

Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

name: Li Bai
title: Swordmaster
quote: “A sword on my hips and a song on my lips: That's how I travel!”
lore:
Li Bai is an eternal romantic and individualist, a poet swordsman who can split a hair with his blade while composing poetry that will be recited in courts across the land. 

Born in Alsahraa, he was well-versed in the writings of Madinat Erudit's sages from an early age, which inspired his personal expression of freedom. He spent much of his youth wandering the world at his leisure, developing a swordmanship that was as unpredictable as his whereabouts. 

However, after witnessing his hometown's destruction and the framing of his friends, the swordsman embarked on a quest for truth and justice.
summary: Li Bai is a situational Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Garo-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Li Xin
title: Great Wall Guard
quote: “I followed the call to build the Great Wall!”
lore:
Born of royal blood, Li Xin has held on firmly to his belief to put his country first. However, because his father was defeated in a power struggle, he bore the legacy of his father's hatred and wrath in his heart. Swearing vengeance, he came to the Great Wall alone, obsessed with reclaiming his glory and territories. 

As he has to choose between the forces of light and darkness, just where will his sword be pointed at?
summary: Li Xin is a strong Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Primordial Crystal. Watch for Cai Yan-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Lian Po
title: Head of the Gandan Clan
quote: “I belong in the heavyweight class!”
lore:
Lian Po was born to a relatively wealthy clan in the Southlands, a background that gave him many advantages but also trouble, as neighbors would often raid his home. Only when Lian Po grew old enough to help protect his clan was the situation gradually reversed, as he was elected clan leader and went on to guard the Southlands with his strength. 

When the Blood Clan invaded, spurred on by his opponent Bai Qi, Lian Po headed to Jixia alone to grow stronger and prove that he could still protect his clan.
summary: Lian Po is a mid-tier Clash Lane Tank who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Lightfoot Shoes. Watch for Jing-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Liang
title: Genius Scholar
quote: “I think, therefore I am.”
lore:
A level-headed and gifted scholar, Liang was often seen holding an ancient manuscript. As a disciple of the sage Jiang Ziya, he had a talent for manipulating the mysterious souls of language. 

But though he was proficient in all the languages of the world and even had the ability to communicate with the forces of the world, he didn't know how to connect with people. Treating everything in the world with a distant and rational attitude, he is following his master's orders to bring order to the world with the spirit of words.
summary: Liang is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Deftness. Watch for Li Xin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Liu Bang
title: Ruler of Ba
quote: “In my own, completely objective opinion, I'm a pretty decent man!”
lore:
Putting one's own interests first has always been the main principle of Liu Bang, the great conspirator. Always an outsider amongst the pious peasantfolk of the Riverlands, he was a man who truly believed that the end justifies the means. 

Oppressed by the ruler of his land, he devised a plan with his friend Liang to replace him: infiltrate one of the rituals of the followers of Omniscient, slay them, and devour the power from the ritual. Liu Bang firmly believes that fate is on his side, and thus his desire to rule was never going to be satisfied with just the Riverlands.
summary: Liu Bang is a struggling Roam Tank who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Cloth Jerkin.

name: Liu Bei
title: Lord of Shu
quote: “Loyalty is what's needed the most to get ahead in this world!”
lore: As the lord of Shu, Liu Bei's most fateful decision properly begins with a meeting between the two lords and future enemies, him and his old friend Cao Cao, a very different kind of ruler known for his tyranny and calculating manipulation. It was Liu Bei's acknowledgment of the secret "Heavenly Scrolls" handed into his safekeeping that initially sparked Liu Bei's great war. Liu Bei's journey past the principality of the conniving Duke Du You found him the recipient of an orphaned child due to his reputation for kindness and, unwilling to abandon him to the conflict, agreed to take him into his care. The forces of Liu Bei were then intercepted by a group of feralis who sought to slay the child as well as an equally strong group of ferali hunters opposed to the same. A battle ensued, during which an enchanted box given along with the baby fell out of his swaddling. The box fell on the ground and, breaking, released all the memories that had been locked within by some unknown sorcery of Liu Bei's former life. He looked around at his companions with new eyes and assured in his conviction of an important mission left unfinished in his last life.
summary: Liu Bei is a situational Jungle Fighter who wants to play dash. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Dyadia-style counters in the enemy draft.

lore: As the son of Liu Bei and the disciple of Kongming, Liu Shan is a man of many titles. To prove his skills, Liu Shan has been causing trouble from an early age. When war came to the streets of Yi, he abandoned his plans to conquer Jixia and joined a war the likes of which had never been seen. Liu Shan piloted his Panda Mecha One onto the battlefield, and the steampunk savant's unstoppable destructive power was impossible to ignore. In his case, the student has truly outdone the master.
summary: Liu Shan is a mid-tier Roam Support who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem. Watch for Li Bai-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Lu Bu
title: Reborn Warrior
quote: “I am the world's worst nightmare!”
lore:
If the original Lu Bu was a nearly invincible fighter, the reborn Lu Bu is a nightmare unleashed upon the world. But after the mighty warrior vowed his unending love to Diaochan, the deadly dancer, he was slowly entangled in her web of schemes and lies, and ultimately met a tragic end. 

Unwilling to accept death, he chose to return as a fiend. Using his Crescent Halberd to capture the souls of his enemies, Lu Bu has been consumed by the hatred in his heart, and the fiend's wrath shall set the world ablaze.
summary: Lu Bu is a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Lightfoot Shoes. Watch for Han Xin-style counters in the enemy draft.

Luban No.7 is a puppet created by Master Luban using advanced mechanical techniques. Though it may look small and adorable, it is capable of causing massive destruction.

name: Luna
title: Head of the Lunari Clan
quote: “My sword is burning, and so is my heart!”
lore:
Luna is a free-spirited warrior blessed by the moon.  Proud and resolute, she presents herself with a commanding aura. 

However, she has experienced her share of darkness. When she was just a young girl, Kaizer, her older brother whom she adored with all her heart, went on a rampage and slaughtered everyone in their family. He had always been kind to her, such that she could not believe he was capable of such a wicked act. Indeed, it was the curse upon their ancient clan that had driven him to act against it: Only one member of the clan could inherit its wondrous powers. She had been chosen, and he had not. Luna understood her brother's suffering and would not fight him. When she willingly offered her life to her brother's sword, he found it impossible to bring it down upon her. 

Now, Luna spends her time searching for her lost brother, becoming ever stronger during her journey.
summary: Luna is a struggling Jungle Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Runeblade. Watch for Athena-style counters in the enemy draft.

title: Explorer
quote: “An entire world is waiting to be discovered out there!”
lore:
Marco Polo bears many titles—traveler, adventurer, polyglot... Free-spirited, intelligent, and passionate, he has an insatiable thirst for knowledge. The intrepid lad was raised by his uncle after losing his father at a young age. 

However, he also inherited a fragment of the ancient Arcana from his father, which was the key to the origins of knowledge. Once he deciphered the information pertaining to the source of knowledge, he followed in his father's footsteps, carrying his twin guns to the distant eastern continent on his own quest for knowledge.
summary: Marco Polo is a top-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Lian Po-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Mayene
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “Martial arts are never the same, and neither is life.”
lore: Mayene is the most troublesome student in Jixia. She is very talented, and clever, but also has rather skewed ideas. She's capricious and spontaneous, and a constant source of distraction that Fuzi had to keep an eye on. Due to her dissatisfaction with her hero father, she is convinced that all heroes are fools. Her dream of teaching at Jixia and retiring there was cut short by her mother's dying wish, which was that she go to Navenia to look for a captain named Red Hawk. She thought it would be an easy task, until she met that "dumbass" of a mercenary...
summary: Mayene is a situational Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Tranquility. Watch for Yaria-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Meng Ya
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “The right mood doubles your firepower!”
lore: Meng Ya always had a prodigious talent for strategy and mechcraft firearms as a child, which he used to come up with many creative battle plans. This often put him at odds with Meng Tian, his strict father and highly orthodox military commander. However, his father's strict upbringing only lit the fuse of his rebelliousness. Finally, a massive argument ended in him packing his unfinished mechcraft cannons and heading for Jixia Academy, alone. Initially seeing the academy as a refuge, he had no idea of the friendships, recognition, and knowledge he would earn by following his own path in life.
summary: Meng Ya is a situational Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for Liu Bang-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Menki
title: Dream Eater
quote: “I'm chasing my dreams of becoming a legend.”
lore:
The dream eaters live in the Forest of Dreams, far away from any human settlement, and fill their stomachs by wandering through the dreams of living beings. One day, during one of these wanderings, a certain little fellow broke into a deity's Dreamscape and was caught in its web. The deity named him "Menki," and the two forged a close friendship. 

But the good times did not last, and the era of the deities soon passed. With the deity nowhere to be found, Menki was left with only fragments of the Heavenly Scrolls as a keepsake. Even though countless years have passed, Menki has not forgotten his partner's entrustment and continues to care for the keepsake, waiting for the day it can be reunited with its original owner.
summary: Menki are a situational Jungle Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Axe of Torment. Watch for Ming-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Mi Yue
title: Yong's Empress Dowager
quote: “To capture youth, is to touch eternity.”
lore:
Highly intelligent and cunning, Mi Yue was the empress dowager of Yong. Despite her low birth, her beauty allowed her to change her destiny for the better. 
Hiding her powers of manipulation behind a noble and radiant exterior, Mi Yue used her beauty as a weapon to assimilate into the various areas of influence in the palace. As her youth gradually faded, her fear that her power too would disappear grew stronger and stronger as the days went on. She began to search for an elixir of life and was willing to pay any price to keep her beauty intact.
summary: Mi Yue is a strong Clash Lane Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Dexterity. Watch for tier-relevant counters in the enemy draft.

name: Milady
title: Ruler of Navenia
quote: “My artificial servants ensure that the world bends to my will.”
lore:
The prideful and autocratic Milady is the consul of Navenia. As a member of a noble family, she received a strict elitist education from an early age, leading her to rule the city as the most formidable member of her family that the residents had ever known.

The curse that plagued her family also invigorated her fighting spirit with a firm and clear goal: to lift the curse and assert her supremacy over Navenia. To that end, the legion of machines she's created will clear all obstacles in her path.
summary: Milady is a strong Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Spell Tome. Watch for Allain-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Ming
title: Leader of the Yaotian Society
quote: “The flowers are in bloom, nurtured by artifice.”
lore:
A dashing diviner who can see the truth hidden in hexagrams and people's hearts. This strange man appeared in Chang'an one day and made it his home. 
To the people there, he is known only as the Peony Diviner. They do not know where he came from, but he has the ability to predict the future with incredible accuracy—even the Empress herself has solicited his services. However, talent doesn't necessarily make life in Chang'an easy. 
A certain judge has been amongst the most suspicious of Ming's motives. Ming's response to all such suspicions is a smile, hidden under which is his true intention: to take back the Great Wall.
summary: Ming is a situational Roam Support who wants to protect carries through burst windows. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

Mozi is an accomplished master in the art of machinery, who has traveled through ancient ruins and helped establish Jixia Academy. 

He also participated in the building of Chang'an, and he personally guards the city with his machines. Relying on his extraordinary talent for piloting them, Mozi and his machinery have become symbols of peace.

name: Mulan
title: Great Wall Guard Commander
quote: “I'm a living legend around here!”
lore:
Mulan has a forthright temperament, and a never-give-up attitude. Though she was plotted against and branded a traitor, she remained on the battlefield and volunteered to defend the Great Wall. 

With her superior leadership and unquestionable strength, and by always entering the thick of the fray with a fearless bravado, Mulan has united powerful warriors in the fight against both feralis and barbarians. Her brilliant red hair and exceptional use of two sets of swords have become hallmarks of this remarkable woman.
summary: Mulan is a struggling Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Meteor. Watch for Diaochan-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Musashi
title: Kyokutou Swordsman
quote: “My path, is that of the peerless samurai.”
lore:
With a longsword in his left hand and a shortsword in his right, the unparalleled swordsmanship of Musashi made him an unstoppable killing machine. 

While Musashi was spending his days roaming the world and challenging the mighty to a battle of blades, his childhood friend Otsu met a tragic end in his hometown. Stricken with grief, Musashi sealed away his sword for three years, before picking it up again with Otsu's spirit's blessing. Musashi then vowed to fulfill Otsu's wish for him to become the mightiest swordsman in the world.
summary: Musashi is a strong Jungle Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Dyadia-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Nakoruru
title: Kyokutou Shrine Maiden
quote: “A new journey begins for Mother Nature's guardian!”
lore:
Nakoruru, the shrine maiden of nature, was well-attuned to the forces of the world, and her guardian eagle, Mamahaha, was her closest companion. As the guardian of nature, she was alerted to a disturbance in the forces: Xu Fu's forces had traveled across the ocean and were using the Blood Clan's power to unleash a blood-driven frenzy in the capital city. 

To discover the truth and save the innocent, Nakoruru and Mamahaha set out on a journey. By flying, of course.
summary: Nakoruru is a situational Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Rapacious Bite. Watch for Diaochan-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Nezha
title: Son of the Commander of Chentang
quote: “My very existence defies reason!”
lore:
The powerful Nezha can be defeated, but never tamed. Due to an illness he had as a child, his master Taiyi Zhenren replaced his heart with a Wonder Key. However, his overwhelming power alienated him from his peers, and there was never a moment when he felt free from the rage burning within him. 

When the superbeings destroyed his homeland in the name of uprooting the Taorians, Nezha's fury ignited the battlefield. But the exertion was too much, and by the end, Nezha lay dying among the ashes. In order to save him, Zhenren gave him his own heart, making him a full person again. Now, the boy reborn in flames will never yield to anyone.
summary: Nezha is a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Giant's Grip.

name: Nuwa
title: Superbeing
quote: “I decide your future!”
lore:
The Primaeran civilization was created by Nuwa, a superbeing who possesses the power to cultivate new worlds. 

Any threat to mankind and civilization will not escape her wrath, and at one point she even waged a war against the superbeing Diqun to prevent the planet's destruction. Her mandates continue to guide mankind, and everyone pays homage to the civilization she has fostered.
summary: Nuwa is a situational Mid Mage who wants to wear down enemies from range. Public guides recommend a build starting with Primordial Crystal. Watch for Liu Bei-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Pei
title: Master Fighter
quote: “Pound-for-pound Chang'an City's top boxer... that's me!”
lore:
Pei is a boxer with the ability to transform into an agile and deadly tiger. Loyal, brave, and strong, he was once a member of the Great Wall Guardians. When the feralis attacked, he attempted to rally for help, but to no avail. 

While making his way back to the Great Wall, he learned that his commander, Su Lie, was accused of aiding the invaders. In order to discover the truth, Pei joined the mysterious Yaotian Society, and since then, he's been actively punishing evil on the streets of Chang'an.
summary: Pei is a situational Jungle Assassin who wants to wear down enemies from range. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Gan & Mo-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Sakeer
title: Firefly Traveler
quote: “I travel far, across mountains and rivers, while galaxies fill the sky.”
lore: Sakeer hails from a secluded land known as Ghabet Firefly. His tribespeople, separated from the outside world for countless generations, were full of curiosity about the lands beyond their borders. In search of stories about these mysterious locales, Sakeer crossed the Forbidden Lands and set off on a journey of exploration. However, when he returned, he found his home long gone. Rather than wallowing in misery, he chose to follow in his father's footsteps. He sat down by the withered tree that his people had cherished and told the stories he had gathered as if everyone was still there. As he did so, fireflies lit up the night sky. Carrying the fireflies' light with him as memories of his home, he embarked on a fresh journey to document new tales.
summary: Sakeer is a mid-tier Roam Support who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Crimson Shadow - Redemption. Watch for Haya-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Shangguan
title: Empress' Spy
quote: “I speak and write my mind.”
lore:
Once a lowly servant girl sequestered in the palace due to her grandfather's involvement in a prince's attempted rebellion against the throne long ago, suffered for years from nightmares filled with murderous flowers and endless. 
She has since become the at the palace painter's suggestion, and has gained permission to roam the streets of Chang'an. 
She is a lady bent on vengeance and uncovering the truth of her grandfather's suspect coup. Now that the peonies have bloomed once again, and the sinister figure has surfaced once again, the truth is almost within reach.
summary: Shangguan is a situational Mid Mage who wants to delete priority targets in one rotation. Public guides recommend a build starting with Spell Tome. Watch for Augran-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Shi
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “Everything that happens to you is another gift from fate.”
lore: Shi, a girl from the Southlands, has had to struggle for her livelihood since she was young. One day, while escaping from debtors, she accidentally stumbled into an abandoned shrine and gained a mysterious power from the southern continent. This power helped her resolve many troubles in the following years, but also attracted some who coveted it. They disguised themselves as debtors and trapped her with a cleverly designed ambush. With Zhuangzi's help, Shi escaped to her new home at the Jixia Academy where she could train her new powers and prepare for the rewarding Dream Trial...
summary: Shi is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Deftness. Watch for Athena-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Shouyue
title: Great Wall Guard
quote: “Another peaceful day at the Great Wall.”
lore:
His fellow Great Wall Guards know him as the  sharpest marksman in the regiment. Coolheaded and warm in equal measure, he reliably provides cover during battles. 

Yet during calm times, his sharp eyes will gaze longingly into the distance toward his hometown. When he was little, he was separated from his younger brother, Xuance, during a bandit attack on their village, and Shouyue has always blamed himself for failing to protect him. Shouyue thus waits by the Great Wall, partially in the hope that his younger brother will eventually have sense enough to look for him there.
summary: Shouyue is a mid-tier Farm Marksman who wants to output sustained ranged damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Sparkforged Dagger. Watch for Liu Bang-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Sima Yi
title: Wei Strategist
quote: “A ruined soul, with unfathomable power.”
lore:
Sima Yi is like a walking shadow, shrouded in the darkness from head to toe, always waiting for an opportunity to strike. He comes from an illustrious anomalic family, who chose to sacrifice him in cold blood in their struggle for power. 

Despite spending a short time as a carefree student of the Jixia Academy, he ended up taking the solitary road of vengeance instead. Hidden by his own shadows, he has conjured a giant scythe to reap all who stand before him.
summary: Sima Yi is a struggling Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Guerrilla Machete. Watch for Alessio-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Sun Bin
title: Jixia Academy Student
quote: “I want to travel into the past! And to explore the future!”
lore:
Sun Bin has always been immensely gifted, but a bit on the quiet side. During his time at Jixia Academy, even though he could manipulate the forces of machinery and even time itself, his peers mostly knew him as a shy and unassuming boy. 

The only one who truly recognized his talent was one of his seniors, who grew envious and proceeded to lay a deadly trap for him. Though Sun Bin survived, he lost his legs and his best friend. 

Using his skills in the art of machinery, he created mechanical wings that made up for the loss of his legs, and the young genius now devotes himself to studying the mysteries of mechanics and time in hopes of one day regaining his lost friend.
summary: Sun Bin is a struggling Roam Support who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

name: Sun Ce
title: Marquis of Wu
quote: “Indomitable waves!”
lore:
Passionate, forthright, chivalrous, and kind, Sun Ce is a leader one can trust. To him, no difficulty is too great, no challenge too daunting. Even as a youth he was ambitious, with dreams of breaking the anomalic rule, implementing a new regime that would benefit the people, and establishing his ideal country in Jiang. 
Sun Ce loves to lead the charge, sailing his ship across the waters. Wherever his anchor drops, you're bound to see his indomitable figure.
summary: Sun Ce is a strong Clash Lane Fighter who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Meteor.

name: Ukyo Tachibana
title: Kyokutou Swordsman
quote: “The most alluring bloom, which blossoms, in the cold of winter, is the only one, that lives in my heart.”
lore:
Loneliness often accompanies true greatness, and while Ukyo Tachibana is known for his superb iaijutsu and gentlemanly demeanor, he also suffers the ravaging effects of tuberculosis. 

His desire for love was awakened by a chance encounter with a young girl, Kei Odagiri. Upon learning that his lover was distressed by her mother's serious illness, he resolutely embarked to Kyokutou in search of the magical flower rumored to cure all diseases.
summary: Ukyo Tachibana is a situational Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Hunting Knife. Watch for Di Renjie-style counters in the enemy draft.
