name: Umbrosa
title: Previous seer of the Misty Marshes, ally of the Omniscient
quote: “Light and shadow, a tapestry of fates interwoven.”
lore: Unlike the rumored Bird Tribe of Misty Marshes, Umbrosa possesses neither sacred wings nor noble character. Only the golden sunlight reflected in her pupils connects her to her past, indicating that she was once the seer Austren. However, when the Bird Tribe fell, she buried that identity along with it. Now, having returned from the abyss, the tattered and scarred Umbrosa has lost everything. In her madness, she imagines that if she can destroy “the root of all evil”, she might be able to restore the true light of the Misty Marshes.
summary: Umbrosa are a mid-tier Clash Lane Fighter who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

name: Wang Zhaojun
title: Princess in a Political Marriage
quote: “Have the plum trees in my hometown blossomed?”
lore:
A princess from the Central Plains, Wang Zhaojun's incomparable beauty is offset by her sorrowful expression, a reflection of her homesickness for her lost hometown. 
She was sent to the Northlands under the guise of a diplomatic marriage, but was instead offered to the Ice Gods. Frozen in ice, she fell into a deep slumber. When she awoke, her hometown was no longer the same, and kneeling before her were the people of the Northlands seeking asylum. 
Though she's now the guardian of the Northlands with the ability to control the power of frost, the plum blossoms of her hometown continue to linger in her heart.
summary: Wang Zhaojun is a strong Mid Mage who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Guardian - Radiance.

name: Wukong
title: Leader of the Ferali Uprising
quote: “The right path is under my feet!”
lore:
Rebellious by nature, Wukong hated being governed and restrained, and he openly despised the shackles the hypocritical superbeings had placed on the feralis. 

During those dark times, he led a rebellion. Wherever his Golden Cudgel went, the shackles of oppression were shattered—and the feralis freed. Until the superbeings used their absolute power to seal him at the foot of Mountains, that is. But the fire within him could not be extinguished, and now he awaits the one destined to forge a new path with him...
summary: Wukong is a strong Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Agudo-style counters in the enemy draft.

title: Jixia Academy Student

lore:
As an orphaned hybrid, Wuyan survived the Southlands because she knew that power and money were the only ways out. 

Savage and determined, she stuck to her way of doing things even at Jixia Academy. From stealing tomes to working as a mercenary, no one could predict what her next wild step would be. Only when she shattered the chains that bound the feralis with her hammer did it finally dawn on people that this formidable warrior had become an unstoppable force.

name: Xiang Yu
title: Tyrant
quote: “If fate is unfair, I'll defy it!”
lore:
Xiang Yu was a bold and gallant man, but Jiang Ziya foretold that it would be he who brought unending darkness upon the world. He was despised and pursued, but he did not believe his fate. 

Refusing to be ostracized by the world, he swung his greatsword to repel the cruel leaders of the Riverlands. This carried on until his lover's arrow pierced his heart, crippling his mind as well as his body, yet he saw clearly that this was not a betrayal. A twist of fate has given him the chance to live again, and this time, he will make sure not to make the same mistake twice.
summary: Xiang Yu is a situational Roam Tank who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of Resistance. Watch for Han Xin-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Xuance
title: Great Wall Guard
quote: “I'm here to steal the show!”
lore: Xuance's life has been defined by two abandonments, and he's tired of it.He was abandoned by his brother when a sudden attack forced Shouyue to depart for the community's forward posts.And then by his mentor and commander, Prince of Lanling. Though this could be charitably interpreted as an opportunity for him to reunite with his brother.Xuance's long association with Prince of Lanling provided him with invaluable training in subterfuge, weapon use, and assassination.Years of dirty work have developed a hard edge to the once innocent young man, but strangely has not removed that sense of innocence entirely. However, it has reaffirmed Xuance's conviction that a life lived without others is happy and sufficient... except for his older brother.
summary: Xuance is a mid-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade. Watch for Daji-style counters in the enemy draft.

name: Yang Jian
title: Enforcer
quote: “I was called upon to protect this mortal world!”
lore:
Yang Jian has a third eye hidden within his forehead, which is why Nuwa chose him as her successor and bestowed upon him the role of protector of the mortal world. 

However, after hunting wrongdoers and patrolling the realm for a long time, he began to have doubts about Nuwa's motives. After he had fought in one war after the next and seen a succession of rulers wrestle control from each other, the trials of his friend Nezha finally made him realize that perhaps the world wasn't quite as fragile as Nuwa would have it. 

The creatures that inhabited it had their own will and lives, and in time, he decided to fight for their right to rule over themselves.
summary: Yang Jian is a situational Clash Lane Fighter who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Relentless Blade.

name: Yango
title: Mechanoid Puppet Maker
quote: “Desire nothing and keep smiling.”
lore: The terrible trauma that Yango suffered as a youth left him mute and rather terrified of social contact. So matters would have remained were it not for the kindly attention of fellow student and mentor Kongming at the Jixia Academy, who taught him how to channel his mind into the art of mechcraft. His quick mastery of this art allowed him to create a lifelike puppet to act as a proxy in transmitting his voice. So skilled reportedly was the artifice, the puppet could even be used to project Yango's voice to sow confusion or deceptions so convincing that even the master manipulator Cao Cao was fooled and clashed with his underling Xu Fu. Yango's artifice was employed again against Cao Cao during the Battle of the Red Cliffs, confusing the commander into delaying his fleet in such a manner as to permit friendly forces to deploy the Eastwind Altar to its full military potential. Thus the youth and his twinkling, miraculous artifice repays those he considers his enemies.
summary: Yango is a mid-tier Jungle Assassin who wants to close distance and snowball off picks. Public guides recommend a build starting with Storm Sword.

lore:
Originally a young forest doe, Yaria was killed in the war, but was given life again through fate's blessing. Innocent and quaint, she sometimes uses her new abilities to transform back into a doe, running and jumping freely in the quiet forest. 

With her magical ability to activate the growth of any living thing, she explores the world in high spirits, and wherever she goes, her capricious pranks always cause quite a stir.
summary: Yaria is a top-tier Roam Support who wants to protect carries through burst windows. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

name: Yixing
title: Young Weiqi Player
quote: “Don't be greedy, but don't lose.”
lore: Yixing was once saved by a mysterious figure known as the "Peony Diviner" just as he was at his lowest point. From then on he took the Peony Diviner as his master, and finally felt a sense of belonging, as if he had found a new home. His newly acquired teacher taught him many techniques both physical and emotional, such as how to disassociate himself from his own suffering and manipulate others to his advantage. Yixing became known as a young prodigy for defeating the Weiqi masters of Kyokutou before Wu Zetian as well as for undertaking many successful covert missions. In every task, he acted with supreme calm, driven by a sincere desire to please his mentor. Now, the winds of change have come to Chang'an, and so the young man has decided to pursue his own, independent designs. The world is his oyster, for he views life akin to a game of Weiqi to be played however he wants.
summary: Yixing is a strong Mid Mage who wants to lock down team fights with crowd control. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane. Watch for Allain-style counters in the enemy draft.

title: Musician at Changle District
quote: “She wore clothes like clouds, and her face was as fresh as blooming flowers...”
lore:
As the most renowned musician in Changle District, can touch the hearts of the entire Chang'an city with a single strum of her. Though many of her patrons admire her talents and beauty, barely anyone knows anything about her.

Even though her melodies can capture the hearts of all who listen, Yuhuan herself can't help but feel empty on the inside as she struggles to understand this "happiness" that is oft mentioned by others.

As she astounds her audience with her talents, she continues to search for her own happiness. As to what form that happiness will take, perhaps she'll arrive at her own answer one day."
summary: Yuhuan is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem. Watch for Luna-style counters in the enemy draft.

quote: “There's a beast within me...”
lore:
This strong man in armor with the flowing hair and resolute look on his face is Zhang Fei, one of the great mechanical masters of Shu. 

However, from a young age, he had to endure the curses of his relatives and the disgust of his neighbors—all because of the ferali blood that runs through his veins. In the end, this fact would even destroy his family. Having lost everything, he imprisoned himself in the depths of a dungeon to work as a mechanical master, but the person who provided shelter was actually the culprit of it all. 

When he is pushed to his limits, the master who can manipulate the most delicate of machines will reveal his true nature as a horrifying human-ferali hybrid, and when this happens, the rage-filled Zhang Fei is unstoppable.
summary: Zhang Fei is a situational Roam Support who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

skills.name: Dark Potential
skills.description: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness. Ferali Form: Casting the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies in range.

skills.name: Forbidden Domain
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range. Knocks back enemy heroes.

skills.name: Leaping Savior
skills.description: Jumps to the target location, granting a shield to nearby teammates. Gains extra Madness for every teammate he shields.

skills.name: Unbridled Outburst
skills.description: Roars and transforms, gaining brief Invincibility, then a shield. The roar forms a gust of wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies. While inside the wind, Zhang Fei gains increased Movement Speed

skills.name: Mad Slaughter
skills.description: Deals damage to targets ahead.

skills.name: Stampede
skills.description: Jumps to the target area, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Zhou Yu
title: Governor of Wu
quote: “What a precise strike, just flawless!”
lore:
Between the interests of the family and Jiang's development, Zhou Yu, who cared deeply for the state and its people, chose the latter. 

Born into a noble family, Zhou Yu was compassionate and trustworthy, and his acquaintance with Sun Ce further fueled his determination to reform Jiang. The calm and proud noble son is sincere in his passion and willingness to sacrifice for his ideals, and that burning desire extends to his passionate love for Xiao Qiao as well.
summary: Zhou Yu is a situational Mid Mage who wants to play sustained damage. Public guides recommend a build starting with Boots of the Arcane. Watch for Augran-style counters in the enemy draft.

skills.name: Blaze
skills.description: Damage from Basic Attacks and skills apply marks to enemy units andstructures. At 4 stacks, targets are slowed and suffer damage over time.

skills.name: Wildfire
skills.description: Invokes a wind domain in the target direction, slowing and knocking back enemies in range. Nearby teammates gain Move Speed, and his nearby fires will spread in the direction of the wind.

skills.name: Scorching Bolt
skills.description: Creates a fire domain at the target location that deals burning damage toenemies in it. There can be up to 5 fire domains at a time. He recovers Health over time while in a fire domain. Can stock up to 3 charges of this skill.

skills.name: Flames of War
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range. lf there's a fire zone in range, any enemies within it will be stunned and take extra damage.

name: Zhuangzi
title: One of the Three Sages of Jixia
quote: “The world where I exist, exists only when I exist.”
lore:
Legends tell of a great man with incredible talent who, along with skills such as riding sea creatures, had the power to call elements from dreams into reality, a power often frustrated by the mundane limitations of the real world. 

This man, driven to explore the limits of his sorcerous abilities, later became known as "Master Zhuangzi" and one of the co-founders of the Jixia Academy.
summary: Zhuangzi is a mid-tier Roam Support who wants to soak engage and create space. Public guides recommend a build starting with Knowledge Gem.

skills.name: Nature's Will
skills.description: Periodically removes crowd control effects and increases Movement Speed and damage reduction.

skills.name: Kaleidoscope
skills.description: Triggers Nature's Will, releasing dream butterflies in a fan-shaped area, inflicting damage and slowing enemies in range.

skills.name: Sleep Starts
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range and increases ally Movement Speed Grants a stack each time dealing damage, up to 5 stacks. Each stack increases skill damage. Passive: Periodically casts Sleep Starts.

skills.name: Butterfly Effect
skills.description: Removes crowd controls from allies within range and increases shield.

name: Zilong
title: Shu General
quote: “This spear holds a power greater than lightning!”
lore:
Integrity and courage make up the foundation of Zilong's life. Even when traveling alone in troubled times, his firm faith has never wavered. 

Growing up with the harsh realities of life in a mercenary group shaped his bold stance, and he never failed to be at the frontlines, earning him the reputation of one who "knows no fear." Now, with the companionship of like-minded people and his silver spear in his hand, he has become an invincible force that is always moving towards higher ideals.
summary: Zilong is a C-tier Jungle Fighter/Assassin in Honor of Kings. Specialty: Gap-Close.

skills.name: Dragon's Roar
skills.description: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.

skills.name: Thunderbreaker
skills.description: Zilong charges forward, dealing damage and enhancing his next Basic Attack. This skill's cooldown is reset whenever his Health reaches a certain level.

skills.name: Stormpiercer
skills.description: Jabs repeatedly in the target direction, dealing damage. Recovers Health on hit.

skills.name: Skysplitter
skills.description: Leaps to the target area, damaging and launching enemies in the center.

name: Ziya
title: Enforcer
quote: “The Sanctifier returns!”
lore: For the good of all humanity, Ziya set out with his best friend, Fuzi, on the Journey of Divinity, and became the first of the Enforcers in the process. In the years that followed, he served as their secret leader, selecting new members at the superbeings' behest. But the good times did not last. To defeat the Dark Master, he sacrificed the greater part of his divine power, and later on, his willful nature led his disciple Wu Zetian to seal him away. However, during his captivity, he achieved enlightenment and recovered his divine power. Now, the Dark Master Diqun seeks to once more invade the mortal world. Hearing this, Ziya could not sit idly by. The ancient Sanctifier broke out of his imprisonment, determined to protect the world in his own way.
summary: Ziya is a mid-tier Mid Mage who wants to wear down enemies from range. Public guides recommend a build starting with Stone of Sorcery. Watch for Biron-style counters in the enemy draft.

skills.name: Sanctification (Ziya)
skills.description: When Ziya deals damage to a target and they are defeated within 4s, he gains EXP. When reaching level, he gains Sanctify, and increases his level cap to 25. Sanctify allows him to increase a teammate's level cap, and potentially earn EXP.

skills.name: Divine Seal
skills.description: Seals enemies within range, dealing magical damage while reducing their Movement Speed, Physical and Magical Defense for 3.5s. If the skill hits an enemy, he gains a Movement Speed boost.

skills.name: Divine Punishment
skills.description: Conjures a magic circle that deals 3 strikes of damage to nearby enemies. After a short delay, the magic circle explodes, dealing extra magical damage and launching enemies for 0.8s.

skills.name: Universal Law
skills.description: Unleashes 3 shockwaves to deal magical damage. Reaching level 15 increases the Ultimate's charging speed by 10% and grants a chance to allow him to move after initiating the charge.
